languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at you dully.{/n} "Yes, it is long past time. I only ask for the privilege of privacy — this admission is difficult for me to make, and I can confide only in you."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн смотрит на вас отрешенно.{/n} "Да, давно пора. Я лишь прошу о привилегии приватности — это признание дается мне с трудом, и довериться с ним я могу только вам".
{n}Eogunn looks at you dully.{/n} "Yes, it is long past time. I only ask for the privilege of privacy — this admission is difficult for me to make, and I can confide only in you."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн смотрит на вас отрешенно.{/n} "Да, давно пора. Я лишь прошу о привилегии приватности — это признание дается мне с трудом, и довериться с ним я могу только вам".

{n}Eogunn looks at you dully.{/n} "Yes, it is long past time. I only ask for the privilege of privacy — this admission is difficult for me to make, and I can confide only in you."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn te mira sombríamente.{/n} «Sí, ya ha llegado el momento. Solo pido el privilegio de la privacidad. Me cuesta mucho admitir esto, y solo puedo confiar en usted».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at you dully.{/n} "Yes, it is long past time. I only ask for the privilege of privacy — this admission is difficult for me to make, and I can confide only in you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn te mira sombríamente.{/n} «Sí, ya ha llegado el momento. Solo pido el privilegio de la privacidad. Me cuesta mucho admitir esto, y solo puedo confiar en usted».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡木然地看着你。{/n}“是的，早就该谈了。我只求您让我私下讲，这话我难以启齿，只能对您一个人坦白。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at you dully.{/n} "Yes, it is long past time. I only ask for the privilege of privacy — this admission is difficult for me to make, and I can confide only in you."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡木然地看着你。{/n}“是的，早就该谈了。我只求您让我私下讲，这话我难以启齿，只能对您一个人坦白。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn vous lance un regard maussade.{/n} « Oui, plus que temps, même. Je ne vous demanderai que le privilège de la confidentialité ; l'aveu que j'ai à faire m'est difficile, et je ne saurais le confier qu'à vous. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at you dully.{/n} "Yes, it is long past time. I only ask for the privilege of privacy — this admission is difficult for me to make, and I can confide only in you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn vous lance un regard maussade.{/n} « Oui, plus que temps, même. Je ne vous demanderai que le privilège de la confidentialité ; l'aveu que j'ai à faire m'est difficile, et je ne saurais le confier qu'à vous. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sieht dich stumpfsinnig an.{/n} "Ja, es ist wirklich höchste Zeit. Ich bitte nur um das Privileg der Privatheit ... dieses Eingeständnis fällt mir schwer und ich kann mich nur Euch anvertrauen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at you dully.{/n} "Yes, it is long past time. I only ask for the privilege of privacy — this admission is difficult for me to make, and I can confide only in you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sieht dich stumpfsinnig an.{/n}"Ja, es ist wirklich höchste Zeit. Ich bitte nur um das Privileg der Privatheit ... dieses Eingeständnis fällt mir schwer und ich kann mich nur Euch anvertrauen."

languages.text: {n}エオグンは呆然とあなたを見ている。{/n}「ええ、もうずいぶん前のことです。この告白は私には難しく、あなたにしか打ち明けられません」。
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at you dully.{/n} "Yes, it is long past time. I only ask for the privilege of privacy — this admission is difficult for me to make, and I can confide only in you."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sana donuk bir şekilde bakıyor.{/n} "Evet, geldi de geçti hatta. Yalnız mahremiyet ayrıcalığı istiyorum. Bu itirafı yapmak benim için zor, bir tek sana güvenebilirim."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at you dully.{/n} "Yes, it is long past time. I only ask for the privilege of privacy — this admission is difficult for me to make, and I can confide only in you."
